title: Yosoji no mitsu tsubo: Otoko suki na nikutai
original_title: 四十路の蜜つぼ 男好きな肉体
overview: Shinobu, a mature woman with a weakness for men, was traveling in search of her former lover, Jo, while engaging in sex purely for pleasure. She found a job posting at a gas station run by a father and son, Yoshito, a fisherman, and decided to take the job and live there. While initially exasperated by Shinobu's complete lack of domestic skills, the two men were drawn to her charm…
